applyTo: "**"

# Quality Gates

Quality gates apply to all changes, regardless of size.

## Scope control
- Do not change unrelated files.
- Keep changes small and reviewable.
- Explicitly map changes back to requirements.

## Assumptions
- If requirements are unclear, write assumptions into the relevant /docs file.
- Never hide assumptions.

## Review gate summary (required)
End multi-step work with:
- What changed
- Risks / mitigations
- Validation steps
- Open questions or TODOs

## Validation
- Every change must have an explicit validation approach.
- If validation is not yet possible, document why.
